title: Glory Glory Man United
lyrics:
Glory, glory, Man United,
Glory, glory, Man United,
Glory, glory, Man United,
As the Reds go marching on, on, on.
description: Manchester United's signature anthem, sung throughout Old Trafford and on away trips.

title: United Road
lyrics:
United Road take me home,
To the place I belong,
To Old Trafford, to see United,
United Road take me home.
description: Fan song sung to the tune of Country Roads, celebrating the journey to Old Trafford.

title: Sit Down Sit Down
lyrics:
If you hate Man United stand up,
If you hate Man United stand up,
If you hate Man United, if you hate Man United,
If you hate Man United stand up.
description: Terrace baiting chant sung to the tune of Blue Moon; invites rival fans to stand if they hate United.

title: Red Army
lyrics:
We are the Red Army,
Marching along,
Singing our song,
Shouting together,
We are the Red Army.
description: Identity chant for United's travelling support, known as the Red Army.

title: 20 Times Champions
lyrics:
20 times, 20 times, Man United,
20 times I tell you, 20 times,
20 times, 20 times, Man United,
We've won the League 20 times.
description: Chant celebrating Manchester United's record 20 English league titles.

title: Theatre of Dreams
lyrics:
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
And we're gonna win today.
description: Chant referencing Old Trafford's famous nickname, coined by Bobby Charlton.

title: Stretford End
lyrics:
We're the Stretford End,
We're the Stretford End,
We're the Stretford End,
And we're gonna sing our song.
description: Chant from the Stretford End, United's historic home terrace at Old Trafford.

title: We Are the Red Devils
lyrics:
We are the Red Devils,
Mighty, mighty Red Devils,
We are the Red Devils,
And we follow United.
description: Terrace identity chant for Manchester United's Red Devils nickname.

title: Manchester Is Red
lyrics:
Manchester is red, Manchester is red,
We hate City, we hate Liverpool,
Manchester is red.
description: Chant asserting United's dominance in Manchester and rivalry with City and Liverpool.

title: George Best (The Belfast Boy)
lyrics:
Georgie Best, Georgie Best,
The Belfast Boy,
Georgie Best, Georgie Best,
The greatest of them all.
description: Tribute to George Best, United's dazzling 1960s winger and Ballon d'Or winner.

title: Ooh Aah Cantona
lyrics:
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona.
description: Iconic Eric Cantona chant from the 1990s; one of United's most enduring terrace songs.

title: Ryan Giggs Will Tear You Apart
lyrics:
Ryan Giggs, Ryan Giggs,
Will tear you apart again.
description: Chant for Ryan Giggs sung to the tune of Joy Division's Love Will Tear Us Apart.

title: Paul Scholes From Fifty Yards
lyrics:
Paul Scholes, he'll score you goals,
Paul Scholes, from 50 yards.
description: Terrace tribute celebrating Paul Scholes's long-range shooting and midfield mastery.

title: David Beckham
lyrics:
Posh and Becks, Posh and Becks,
David Beckham, he's the best,
Posh and Becks, Posh and Becks,
David Beckham, he's the best.
description: 1990s chant for David Beckham, United's iconic right midfielder and free-kick specialist.

title: Wayne Rooney (Running Down the Wing)
lyrics:
Rooney, Rooney,
Running down the wing,
Rooney, Rooney,
Running down the wing.
description: Terrace song for Wayne Rooney, United's record goalscorer.

title: Viva Ronaldo
lyrics:
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo.
description: Chant for Cristiano Ronaldo during his first spell at Old Trafford (2003-2009).

title: Stand Up If You Love Roy Keane
lyrics:
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up, stand up.
description: Call-and-response tribute to captain Roy Keane, the heart of United's midfield dynasty.

title: Sir Alex Ferguson
lyrics:
There's only one Alex Ferguson,
One Alex Ferguson,
There's only one Alex Ferguson.
description: Tribute to Sir Alex Ferguson, manager of United's 26-year trophy-laden era.

title: Marcus Rashford
lyrics:
Rashford, la la la la la la la,
Rashford, la la la la la la la,
If he's good enough for you, he's good enough for me,
If he scores another few, then I'll be Mancunian too.
description: Modern terrace chant for Marcus Rashford, adapted from the Mo Salah melody.

title: Bruno Fernandes
lyrics:
Bruno, Bruno, Bruno Fernandes,
From Sporting to United,
Bruno, Bruno, Bruno Fernandes,
He's our Portuguese jewel.
description: Chant for Bruno Fernandes, United's creative midfield talisman since 2020.

title: 1999 Treble
lyrics:
We've won the treble,
We've won the treble,
Manchester United,
We've won the treble.
description: Celebration chant for United's historic 1998-99 treble of Premier League, FA Cup, and Champions League.

title: One Nil to United (Solskjaer)
lyrics:
One nil to United, one nil to United,
Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, one nil to United.
description: Chant immortalising Ole Gunnar Solskjaer's injury-time winner in the 1999 Champions League final.

title: Manchester City Taunt (Blue Moon)
lyrics:
Blue Moon, you saw me standing alone,
Without a dream in my heart,
Without a trophy of my own.
description: Rivalry taunt sung to Manchester City's Blue Moon anthem, mocking their trophy drought.

title: Bertie's Got a City
lyrics:
Bertie's got a City, City, City,
Bertie's got a City on his head.
description: Classic Manchester derby taunt referencing City's perceived inferiority to United.

title: Going Down Liverpool
lyrics:
Going down, going down, so are Liverpool,
Going down, going down, so are Liverpool,
If you hate Liverpool, clap your hands.
description: Rivalry chant directed at Liverpool, often sung during title races or relegation battles.

title: Arsenal Taunt (What Were You Thinking)
lyrics:
What were you thinking, what were you thinking,
Signing Emmanuel Adebayor?
description: Banter chant aimed at Arsenal, referencing Adebayor's move to Manchester City.

title: Leeds United Taunt
lyrics:
We all hate Leeds Scum, we all hate Leeds Scum,
We all hate Leeds Scum.
description: Rivalry chant against Leeds United, one of English football's fiercest historic rivalries.

title: We're Man United Sing What We Want
lyrics:
We're Man United, we'll sing what we want,
We're Man United, we'll sing what we want.
description: Defiant away-end chant asserting United fans' right to sing anywhere.

title: You're Not Singing Anymore
lyrics:
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore,
Your team's going home, your team's going home.
description: Generic terrace taunt used by United fans when silencing opposition supporters.

title: Who Are Ya
lyrics: Who are ya? Who are ya? Who are ya?
description: Standard away-end taunt directed at opposition fans whose team is losing.

title: Bobby Charlton
lyrics:
Bobby Charlton, Bobby Charlton,
The greatest Red of all,
Bobby Charlton, Bobby Charlton,
He never took a fall.
description: Tribute to Sir Bobby Charlton, 1968 European Cup winner and England World Cup hero.

title: Bryan Robson (Captain Marvel)
lyrics:
Captain Marvel, Captain Marvel,
Bryan Robson, Captain Marvel.
description: Chant for Bryan Robson, United's inspirational captain through the 1980s and early 1990s.

title: Denis Law (The King)
lyrics:
Denis Law, Denis Law,
The King of Old Trafford,
Denis Law, Denis Law,
The King of Old Trafford.
description: Tribute to Denis Law, the Lawman, one of United's greatest strikers of the 1960s.

title: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer (Baby-Faced Assassin)
lyrics:
Ole, Ole, Ole Gunnar Solskjaer,
Ole, Ole, Ole Gunnar Solskjaer.
description: Celebratory chant for Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, super-sub and 1999 Champions League hero.

title: Peter Schmeichel
lyrics:
Schmeichel, Schmeichel,
Standing on the wall,
Schmeichel, Schmeichel,
He's the best of all.
description: Tribute to Peter Schmeichel, United's legendary Danish goalkeeper of the 1990s dynasty.

title: Rio Ferdinand
lyrics:
Rio Ferdinand, he plays at the back,
Rio Ferdinand, he's the best in the land.
description: Chant for Rio Ferdinand, commanding centre-back of the Ferguson era.

title: Nemanja Vidic
lyrics:
Vidic, Vidic, Nemanja Vidic,
Vidic, Vidic, he'll break your legs.
description: Terrace tribute to Nemanja Vidic, United's fearsome Serbian centre-back.

title: Rio and Vida (Defence Partnership)
lyrics:
Rio and Vida, Rio and Vida,
Rio and Vida, the best in the land.
description: Chant celebrating the Rio Ferdinand and Nemanja Vidic centre-back partnership.

title: Patrice Evra
lyrics:
Patrice Evra, he plays left-back,
Patrice Evra, he plays for United.
description: Chant for French left-back Patrice Evra, a key member of multiple title-winning sides.

title: Park Ji-sung
lyrics:
Park Ji-sung, he runs all day,
Park Ji-sung, he runs all day.
description: Tribute to Park Ji-sung, the tireless South Korean midfielder beloved at Old Trafford.

title: Edwin van der Sar
lyrics:
Edwin van der Sar, the goalkeeper,
Edwin van der Sar, the best in the world.
description: Chant for Dutch goalkeeper Edwin van der Sar, United's No. 1 from 2005 to 2011.

title: Dwight Yorke
lyrics:
Dwight Yorke, he scores the goals,
Dwight Yorke, he plays for United.
description: Tribute to Dwight Yorke, prolific striker and key figure in the 1999 treble season.

title: Faith in Youth
lyrics:
Faith, faith in youth,
United have got faith in youth,
Faith, faith in youth,
United have got faith in youth.
description: Chant celebrating United's tradition of developing young players through the academy.

title: The Busby Babes
lyrics:
The Busby Babes were glorious,
The Busby Babes were glorious,
The Busby Babes were glorious,
And they never will be forgotten.
description: Remembrance chant for the Busby Babes, United's young team tragically lost in the 1958 Munich air disaster.

title: Flowers of Manchester
lyrics:
The flowers of Manchester lay sleeping,
In the cold, dark earth, in the rain,
And the flowers of Manchester united,
Will bloom and bloom again.
description: Solemn song commemorating the Munich air disaster of 6 February 1958.

title: Three European Cups
lyrics:
We've won it three times, we've won it three times,
Manchester United, we've won it three times.
description: Chant celebrating United's three European Cup/Champions League titles before 2008.

title: Champions of Europe (1968)
lyrics:
Champions of Europe, champions of Europe,
Manchester United, champions of Europe.
description: Celebration of United's first European Cup triumph at Wembley in 1968 under Matt Busby.

title: Follow Follow Man United
lyrics:
Follow, follow, follow,
Follow Man United,
Follow, follow, follow,
On to victory.
description: Core call-and-response chant declaring support for United home and away.

title: Come On You Reds
lyrics:
Come on you Reds, come on you Reds,
Come on you Reds, come on you Reds.
description: Simple repetitive terrace chant urging United on during matches.

title: We Love United
lyrics:
We love United, we do,
Oh United we love you, we do,
Oh United we love you, we do,
And we follow United through and through.
description: Terrace song affirming lifelong support for Manchester United.

title: Old Trafford Bound
lyrics:
We're going up to Old Trafford,
We're going up to Old Trafford,
We're going up to Old Trafford,
To see United win.
description: Matchday chant sung by fans heading to the Theatre of Dreams.

title: Everywhere We Go
lyrics:
Everywhere we go,
People want to know,
Who we are,
So we tell them,
We are United, mighty mighty United.
description: Away-day chant introducing United's travelling support to rival grounds.
